author: taulepton_
content: Hey <@824439091004309535> I've merged latest changes into `optional-proofs` branch. There are some changes required to get docker build working in CI but you can run testnets locally using kurtosis just fine. Instructions for kurtosis installation and operation found here https://github.com/eth-act/lighthouse/blob/optional-proofs/scripts/local_testnet/README.md#eip-8025-testnets

author: taulepton_
content: If you have any questions please feel free to let me know
